name: Jeff Garlin
blurb: The Chicago improv lifer who walks onstage with no set, talks until something is funny, and pulls it off because of taste.
bio: Jeff Garlin is a Second City product who built a stand-up career out of pure improvisation — no premise, no setlist, just a fat happy man with a microphone and the nerve to find the bit in the room. That looseness is exactly what Larry David hired him for on Curb Your Enthusiasm, where Garlin plays Jeff Greene, the manager-best-friend whose job is essentially to laugh believably at Larry. Across two HBO/Showtime-era specials — Young and Handsome (2009, directed by Bob Odenkirk at Chicago's Second City) and Our Man in Chicago (Netflix 2019, taped on the 37th anniversary of his stand-up debut) — he turned the autobiographical Chicago-Jew-with-an-eating-problem material into a kind of stand-up jazz. He is also Murray Goldberg on The Goldbergs, Captain B. McCrea in WALL-E, and Buttercup in the Toy Story sequels.

podcast.name: By the Way, In Conversation with Jeff Garlin

timeline.ev: Stand-up debut at the age of 19; later cited as the anniversary date Our Man in Chicago is taped on
Joins The Second City Mainstage in Chicago
Begins playing Jeff Greene on HBO's Curb Your Enthusiasm; produces the series across its full run
Voice of Captain B. McCrea in Pixar's WALL-E
Young and Handsome: A Night with Jeff Garlin (HBO) — first hour special, taped at Chicago's Second City, directed by Bob Odenkirk
Begins playing Murray Goldberg, family patriarch, on ABC's The Goldbergs
Jeff Garlin: Our Man in Chicago (Netflix), taped on the 37th anniversary of his stand-up debut
Curb Your Enthusiasm concludes after twelve seasons

accolades: Producer credit across the full run of Curb Your Enthusiasm (HBO)
Two hour specials with majors (HBO 2009, Netflix 2019)
Pixar lead-voice roles (Captain McCrea in WALL-E; Buttercup across the Toy Story franchise)

specials.t: Jeff Garlin: Our Man in Chicago
